nonGoals: Do NOT touch any test files
Do NOT modify engine, report, or domain packages
Do NOT add any new code
objective: Strip all Swift-specific production code: the policy constant, the languagePolicy case, and the YAML policy pack file.
planText: Remove the swiftStandardPolicy constant block entirely and delete the `case "swift": return swiftStandardPolicy` branch from languagePolicy() in cmd/certify/init_cmd.go. Delete testdata/policies/swift-standard.yml. Run `go build -o build/bin/certify ./cmd/certify/` to confirm compilation. Existing tests that reference Swift will fail — those are fixed in the next deliverable.

nonGoals: Do NOT create any new test files
Do NOT modify production code beyond what D0 already changed
Do NOT add N/A-grade or unsupported-banner test cases yet
objective: Update existing test fixtures to match the Swift-free world: supported-language lists and policy-pack counts.
planText: In cmd/certify/cli_test.go, remove "swift" from the supported-languages slice in TestLanguagePolicy_AllSupported (change from 6 languages to 5: go, typescript, javascript, python, rust). In internal/config/policy_test.go, change the pack-count assertion from 7 to 6 and remove "swift-standard" from the expected-name list. After this deliverable, all pre-existing tests pass again.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify report/card.go or report/full.go
Do NOT alter scoring logic for supported languages
Do NOT remove any existing engine test
objective: Ensure the engine emits N/A (not F) for unsupported-language units, and lock in the analyzer-registry contract with a new language_tiers_test.go.
planText: In internal/engine/certifier.go and internal/engine/pipeline.go, guard CertifyUnit so that when a unit's language has no registered analyzer (analysis.ForLanguage returns nil), the unit is marked with an N/A grade (GradeUnsupported or equivalent) rather than score-0→F. If needed, add GradeUnsupported to internal/domain/dimension.go and StatusUnsupported to internal/domain/record.go. Create internal/engine/language_tiers_test.go with: TestForLanguage_SupportedLanguages (go/ts/js/py/rs return non-nil), TestForLanguage_SwiftReturnsNil, and TestCertifyUnit_SwiftUnitGetsNA.

nonGoals: Do NOT add or modify test files in this deliverable
Do NOT change the engine or domain packages
Do NOT alter the card layout for supported-only reports
objective: Add unsupported-language banner to the card report and exclude unsupported records from full-report aggregate scoring.
planText: In internal/report/card.go, after computing OverallGrade, detect whether any records are unsupported-language N/A units; if so, add an unsupported-language banner/warning to the card output. In internal/report/full.go's buildLanguageDetail, exclude unsupported-language records from aggregate score calculations so they do not drag down language averages.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify production code in this deliverable
Do NOT change any engine or domain tests
Do NOT add tests for packages other than internal/report
objective: Add N/A-grade, unsupported-banner, and aggregate-exclusion test coverage to the report test suite.
planText: Add test cases to internal/report/card_test.go: TestGenerateCard_WithUnsupportedLanguage (a swift record → card shows unsupported banner, overall grade computed only from supported units) and TestGenerateCard_AllUnsupported (all records unsupported → grade is N/A). Add test cases to internal/report/full_test.go: TestFullReport_UnsupportedExcludedFromAggregates (language detail excludes swift from averages) and TestFullReport_UnsupportedBanner (report output mentions unsupported languages).
